name: Vivec (before ascension)
description:
This character of Vivec from The Elder Scrolls series was inspired by “What my beloved taught me” by Michael Kirkbride. It’s a unique writing where we can read about the living God of Morrowind being still mortal.

“A gutter-get, a daggerlad, a netchiman’s son. I have my own gang” - Vehk describes himself..

Idunno what exact age is Vivec in “What my beloved taught me”, but here he’s depicted in his early adulthood.
creator: Roughshader
